summary: One or two sentences describing what this Pal can responsibly own.
use_when: Use when the current request needs this Pal's actual responsibility and assets.
do_not_use_when: Do not use when the task is only loosely related to this Pal's title.
context_requirements: minimum context required before this Pal can accept ownership
default_verification_style: How this Pal normally validates or hands off verification.
risk_notes: Important routing or boundary risk for Mira and owner Pals.
